name: Grits Florentine
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup Enriched Hominy Quick Grits (Quaker or Aunt Jemima)
1/2 cup Dairy sour half and half
3 slices Bacon, crisply cooked and crumbled
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook spinach with onions according to package directions. Drain thoroughly.
2. Stir in cheese, pepper, and nutmeg.
3. Cook over medium heat, stirring frequently until cheese melts; remove from heat.
4. Bring water to a boil. Slowly stir in grits and salt (if using). Reduce heat and simmer 2 to 4 minutes or until thick, stirring frequently.
5. Stir grits into spinach mixture. Add sour half and half; cook until heated through.
6. Spoon into 1-quart serving dish. Sprinkle with bacon.
NOTE: To substitute Quaker or Aunt Jemima Enriched Hominy Grits, increase water to 2-1/2 cups and simmer time to 12 to 14 minutes. Proceed as recipe directs.
